generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? Just last year, a minor cyber incident in a key ally caused delays in our emergency response systems. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring we can protect our citizens when it matters most. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
